name: Fell off ladder in Boise ID at construction job, comp process?
description: Report now, file Form 1 with ID Commission.

mainEntity.name: Fell off ladder in Boise ID at construction job, comp process?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report now, file Form 1 with ID Commission.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Report to employer, file with Idaho Industrial Commission within 1 year.**

No-fault; covers falls from height. Local rules emphasize prompt notice.

- Form 1 submission.
- Hearing if disputed.[5]
- Pre-existing ok if aggravated.

Attorney advised for Boise filings.
